emr.amend_label: This is an amendment to a previous EMR
emr.readonly_desc: Your role can view this EMR but cannot edit or sign it.

manager_catalog.title: Catalog — Products & Courses
manager_catalog.subtitle: Manage medications, supplies, courses and the BOMs that auto-deduct stock
manager_catalog.help_reorder_body: Reorder point is the stock level that triggers a low-stock alert. When a product's balance drops to or below this number, the manager dashboard surfaces it under "Items to reorder". Set it to ~7-14 days of typical usage. Leave 0 to disable alerts for that product.
manager_catalog.help_bom_title: What is a BOM (Bill of Materials)?
manager_catalog.help_bom_body: A BOM is the recipe of supplies a procedure consumes. When NURSE marks a procedure Complete, the worker reads the active BOM version for that procedure and auto-deducts the listed quantities from stock. Example: PROC_BTX_FACE → 0.5 vial of BTX-100U, 4 needles, 1 gauze pack. Editing creates a new version; old visits keep using the version that was active at the time.
manager_catalog.product_dialog_desc: Medications, supplies, cosmetics and courses all live here.
manager_catalog.bom_dialog_desc: Materials consumed from stock each time this procedure is completed. Saving creates a new version — history is preserved.
manager_catalog.bom_empty: No materials. Click Add material below.
manager_catalog.bom_validation: Every item needs a product and qty > 0

eod.title: End-of-Day Operations
eod.subtitle: Close shift, settle gateway batches, and reconcile inventory in one place
eod.no_open_shift_desc: Open a shift to start tracking cash flow for the day
eod.open_shift_desc: Record the cash float you put in the drawer at the start of the shift
eod.cash_opening_hint: Cash put in the drawer at the start of the shift
eod.close_shift_desc: Count the drawer and reconcile against expected. Variance is logged + manager notified if above threshold.
eod.notes_placeholder: e.g. ฿200 short — accepted as till float refresh
eod.edit_shift_desc: Correct opening float or notes — only allowed while the shift is still open.
eod.settle_desc: Records gateway batch reference, optionally distributes fees, then emits payment.settled to the accounting export pipeline.
eod.fee_total_hint: Distributed evenly across the selected payments
eod.recon_confirm_desc: Adjustment ledger rows are inserted for any non-zero variance — this cannot be undone, only reversed by another reconcile.

patients.new_subtitle: Reception/Doctor — minimum required: name. Phone is recommended for OTP login later.
patients.validation_name_required: First and last name are required
patients.edit_subtitle: PII fields are encrypted; previous values are decrypted on display.

medical_cert.issue_subtitle: Doctor only — diagnosis & rest period are stamped onto the certificate PDF.
medical_cert.recommendation_placeholder: e.g. Avoid strenuous activity. Follow-up in 7 days.
medical_cert.validation_failed: Diagnosis required and dates must be valid

tax_invoice.issue_subtitle: Generate ใบกำกับภาษี for {number}. The buyer's tax-payer info is stamped onto the PDF and exported to the e-Tax CSV.
tax_invoice.validation_failed: Please fill all required buyer fields

consents.capture_subtitle: Record a signed consent form. The PDF is rendered by the worker.

patient_merge.title: Patient Merge
patient_merge.subtitle: Detect duplicate records and consolidate them into a single timeline
patient_merge.no_duplicates_desc: Records look clean — patient lookup is consistent across phone and name+DOB
patient_merge.merge_dialog_desc: Pick the surviving record (target) — the source record will be marked MERGED and its children will move under the target.
patient_merge.merge_warning: All appointments, visits, invoices, EMRs and consents will be moved. This action cannot be undone.
patient_merge.reason_placeholder: Why are these the same patient? e.g. "Same NHS ID, name spelled differently in registration form"
patient_merge.reason_required: Reason must be at least 8 characters
patient_merge.reason_help: Required by PDPA Article 30 — keep concrete (≥ 8 chars)
patient_merge.pick_distinct: Source and target must be different patients

pdpa.title: PDPA / Data Subject Rights
pdpa.subtitle: Process the patient's right to data access (export) and erasure (anonymise)
pdpa.policy_line_1: Export returns every PII field decrypted, in a JSON manifest.
pdpa.policy_line_2: Anonymise replaces name/phone/email with a stable pseudonym — ledgers stay (7-year retention).
pdpa.policy_line_3: Both actions are written to the audit log and emit an outbox event.
pdpa.action_help_admin: Export sends the patient a copy of their data · Anonymise wipes PII (irreversible) — reason ≥ 8 chars required.
pdpa.action_help_manager: Manager may only Export. If the patient asks for erasure (Anonymise), an ADMIN must run it.
pdpa.anonymize_locked: ADMIN only — anonymisation cannot be undone.
pdpa.summary_merged_warning: This patient is already merged — operate on the surviving record instead.
pdpa.anonymize_confirm: Anonymise this patient? This replaces name/phone/email with a pseudonym and cannot be reversed.

labs.title: Lab Orders

labs.result_desc: One KEY: VALUE per line. PDF report can be attached separately.
